items.title: These 3 Dow Stocks Are Set to Soar in 2026 and Beyond
items.description: Nvidia, Microsoft, and Amazon could be the Dow's top-performing stocks next year.

items.title: Dow Jones Stock Caterpillar In Buy Zone After Recent Breakout Move

items.title: Don't Underestimate Inflation - It Will Cost You
items.description: Persistent 3-4% inflation is likely the new normal. Read why portfolio vigilance and targeted diversification are essential to generate alpha in this environment.

items.title: 3 Stocks Most Likely to Split in 2026
items.author: Thomas Hughes
items.description: The article highlights three stocks likely to split in 2026: Meta Platforms, Ulta Beauty, and Caterpillar, based on their strong financial performance, growth potential, and stock price momentum.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Strong AI-driven growth, 550% stock rise in past 3-4 years, expected 25% upside, and potential first stock split among Magnificent Seven stocks
Trading near record highs around $600, gaining market share, expanding store count, aggressive share buybacks, and 25% potential upside
Near $600 stock price, global business strength, datacenter construction surge, consistent dividend growth, and 60% price increase in past 12 months
